name: Create eco news with valid data -- @1.1
fullName: Create Eco News: Create eco news with valid data

steps.name: And Get Create Eco News client
When I send POST request to create eco news with data:

parameters.name: files
parameters.value: {'image': ('image.jpg', <_io.BufferedReader name='/tmp/tmpp1ouqd9m.jpg'>, 'image/jpeg'), 'addEcoNewsDtoRequest': (None, '{"source": "https://example.org", "shortInfo": "Climate change update", "tags": ["news", "events"], "title": "Climate change update", "text": "Full article text here", "titleTranslation": {"content": "Climate News", "languageCode": "en"}, "textTranslation": {"content": "Full article text here", "languageCode": "en"}}', 'application/json')}

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {'source': 'https://example.org', 'shortInfo': 'Climate change update', 'tags': ['news', 'events'], 'title': 'Climate change update', 'text': 'Full article text here', 'titleTranslation': {'content': 'Climate News', 'languageCode': 'en'}, 'textTranslation': {'content': 'Full article text here', 'languageCode': 'en'}}

steps.name: Then the response status code should be 201

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {"source":"https://example.org","shortInfo":"Climate change update","tags":["news","events"],"title":"Climate change update","text":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Climate News","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Full article text here","languageCode":"en"}}

parameterValues: {"source":"https://example.org","shortInfo":"Climate change update","tags":["news","events"],"title":"Climate change update","text":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Climate News","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Full article text here","languageCode":"en"}}
